bird.name: 赤肩鵟
bird.summary: 赤肩鵟（学名：Buteo lineatus）为鹰科鵟屬的一种鸟，分布于北美洲，该物种于1788年由约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林描述，被IUCN列为无危物种。雄性体长大约为38至58公分，雌性体长大约为47至61公分。 其种加词“Lineatus”意为“有线纹的”。

relations.subject: 赤肩鵟
relations.evidence: In the east, they live in bottomland hardwood stands, flooded deciduous swamps, and upland mixed deciduous–conifer forests
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 赤肩鵟
relations.evidence: The main conservation threat to the widespread species is deforestation
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: 赤肩鵟
relations.evidence: In spite of these dangers, habitat loss remains the biggest threat to red-shouldered hawks
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
